description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized humanoid figure with a large, round head and simplified limbs, standing on a hexagonal pedestal. The entire figure is rendered in a greenish, mottled stone texture, giving it the appearance of being carved from jade or serpentine. The head features concentric circular engravings and a central medallion-like relief, adding an ornamental and possibly symbolic element. The arms are short and curve downward, while the legs are squat and sturdy, contributing to a sense of stability. The surface is rough and matte, with visible stone grain and subtle color variations throughout. The base is integrated with the figure, providing both support and a sense of monumentality.
description: A stylized humanoid sculpture carved from green mottled stone, featuring a large engraved head and standing on a hexagonal pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved circular patterns on the head and the full frontal form of the figure with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, the thickness of the arms, and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the head and body, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the curvature of the arm and the profile of the head and base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
